category_sources: source_facts.description says pwntools is a CTF framework; official GitHub README describes it as a CTF framework and exploit development library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives pwntools; official GitHub README title uses pwntools.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/Gallopsled/pwntools states documentation is available at docs.pwntools.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official GitHub README identify a Python CTF and exploit development toolkit.
